case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. RENANDO B. DEGUZMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, RENANDO B. DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-2021

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200020574), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED NOV-30-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE DEC-01-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, RENANDO B.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100123624) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, RENANDO B.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200039490) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, RENANDO B.
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-18-2021 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JAN-11-2022 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, RENANDO B. $1,436.85 PRINCIPAL, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,951.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION REGARDING STATEMENT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200031036) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-11-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-18-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
